title: Roman Numerals Over 10
description: Adds Roman Numerals for enchantments over the level of 10.
body:
**Roman Numerals Over 10** is a lightweight resource pack that replaces standard enchantment level numbers above 10 (e.g. 11, 12...) with proper Roman numerals. Perfect for immersion-focused players, this pack keeps things vanilla-friendly while giving high-level enchantments a cleaner and more thematic look.

## 🪄 Features:

Displays enchantment levels 11+ using Roman numerals (e.g. XI, XII, XX).

Works seamlessly with Vanilla Minecraft's font system.

No OptiFine or mods required.

## 🔧 Compatibility:

- ✅ Minecraft: 1.20+
  
- ✅ Vanilla
  
- ✅ Works with any mod or plugin that allows enchantments over level 10
